title: Set up Google Analytics 4 (GA4) with Next.js App Router
summary: Install the GA4 gtag script via Next.js Script component, track page views on route changes, and send custom events — all GDPR-aware.
declaration: I will set up Google Analytics 4 (GA4) using the gtag.js script in Next.js App Router. If you want a privacy-first alternative like PostHog or Plausible, say so before I begin.
